completedTasks.title: Angemeldet bleiben — Two-tier session persistence
completedTasks.summary: Login checkbox 'Angemeldet bleiben' (default checked). Persistent mode: localStorage + 30d idle. Ephemeral mode: sessionStorage + 3h idle. Hybrid storage adapter in supabase.ts reads portal-remember-me flag. signIn/signInWithMagicLink accept remember param. 7 tests in session-timeout.test.ts.

completedTasks.title: Peer-to-Peer Notifications for Organizations
completedTasks.summary: Portal user comments in ticket/project chat now fan out to other org members (bell + email). New peer_messages toggle in Konto settings. New _shared/org.ts helper getOrgContextForUserAndTask resolves org from caller first, validates task belongs to that org (cross-org authz). Includes reusable e2e test infra in tests/ — 9/9 assertions verified on staging.

completedTasks.title: Credit Re-approval Flow
completedTasks.summary: Atomic credit re-approval: task_cache.approved_credits column + backfill, upsert_task_deduction RPC (SECURITY DEFINER, partial-index UPSERT), CreditApproval UI three render states, email + bell re-approval wording ('Aktualisierte Kostenfreigabe'), webhook race fix (force-fetch credits from ClickUp on re-approval), removed webhook auto-delta anti-pattern.

completedTasks.title: Organizations Milestone (Phases 9-14)
completedTasks.summary: Full multi-user org system: organizations + org_members tables, data migration, dual-mode RLS, OrgProvider context, /organisation admin page (TeamSection, InviteMemberDialog, MemberRowActions), viewer role guards on frontend + backend, Empfehlungen tab admin-only, sidebar badge exclusion for non-admins. Legacy profile_id columns dropped from credit_packages and client_workspaces.

completedTasks.title: Hilfe FAQ Page
completedTasks.summary: Full FAQ page: 6 accordion sections, 20 items, German. FaqItem (AnimatePresence), FaqSection (icon card), hilfe-faq-data.ts. Tests added, IntersectionObserver mock, tsconfig test exclusion. GitHub Actions workflows removed (App not installed).

completedTasks.title: Credit Approval Workflow + Auto-Deduction
completedTasks.summary: AWAITING APPROVAL status, CreditApproval UI, auto-deduction on COMPLETE with approval guard, unique constraint on deductions, credit_approved marker.

completedTasks.title: Project Email Notifications
completedTasks.summary: Added step_ready + project_reply email templates, completion + work-started handlers. Fixed dedup English keywords, missing taskId, EmailRequest type union.

completedTasks.title: Design Polish
completedTasks.summary: Typography, Motion animations, Hugeicons sidebar, credit tokens, TaskList extraction.

completedTasks.title: Full Playwright QA + Bug Fixes
completedTasks.summary: Full portal click-through. Fixed: On Hold Resume, NotificationBell 404, StatusBadge umlaut. Launch-ready.

completedTasks.title: Credit System Phase 1
completedTasks.summary: Credits on tasks, balance in sidebar/tickets, webhook sync, monthly top-up cron, 3 packages (10/25/50).

completedTasks.title: File Management — Upload + Create Folder
completedTasks.summary: Upload + mkdir in DateienPage with client-root Edge Function actions.

completedTasks.title: UI Component Unification — shadcn/ui Migration
completedTasks.summary: 8 shadcn/ui components installed (Button, Badge, Input, Textarea, Tabs, Skeleton, Avatar, AlertDialog). 32 files changed, 16 created. Hardcoded colors replaced with CSS tokens. StepDetail 247→67 lines. NewTicketDialog 243→105 lines.

completedTasks.title: Nextcloud Folder Structure + Portal Navigation
completedTasks.summary: Standard client folder hierarchy, shared slugify(), sidebar Dateien + dynamic project submenu.

completedTasks.summary: DB Realtime publication, subscription fixes, polling removed.

completedTasks.summary: Profile, avatar, email/password, notification preferences, logout.

completedTasks.summary: 5x CTA dedup, comment input, MessageSheet, quick actions, activity timeline.

ideas.title: Rotate Leaked Service Role JWT + Repo Visibility Review
ideas.summary: GitGuardian flagged service_role JWT в публичном repo (40+ дней). Ротация требует downtime. Рассмотреть перевод в private + rotation.
